signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders and 148 Million Daily Transactions on April 14, 2026, Boosted by Al
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders and 148 Million Daily Transactions on April 14, 2026, Boosted by Alpenglow Upgrade** | YES | HIGH  
Solana's network achieved an all-time high of 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions as of April 14, 2026, driven by the Alpenglow consensus upgrade reducing transaction finality to 150 milliseconds from 12 s

signals.headline: Bank of Korea Holds Key Interest Rate at 2
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Key Interest Rate at 2.5% for 7th Consecutive Time Amid Stable Inflation at 2.2% YoY in March 2026 | NO | HIGH confidence** [2][3][6]

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased slightly to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, below market forecasts of 2.4% and aligning with the central bank's 2% target amid contained pressures before Middle East volatility.[2] The

signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Collapse; Trump Launches Naval Blockade of Strait of Hormuz | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Collapse; Trump Launches Naval Blockade of Strait of Hormuz | NO | HIGH confidence**  
US-Iran negotiations in Pakistan ended without agreement on Sunday, with no path forward on ending the war, primarily due to Iran's refusal to abandon nuclear ambitions—Trump demands "all or none."[1][2]
